notes: Generous L8 score-1 smoke ceilings for one warmed process_session() pass of an 8-message fixture.
Local debug baseline observed ~15-55 KiB / ~200-300 allocations; ceilings keep large headroom.
Measured via stats_alloc Region delta in tests/allocation_budget.rs — not jemalloc / dhat continuous profiling.
Not a production SLA; tighten after real allocator profiling lands.
